title: r8r Workflow
description: Schema for r8r workflow YAML files. Reference: https://r8r.dev/docs/workflows

name.description: Unique workflow identifier used in CLI and API calls.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this workflow does.

version.description: Version number incremented on each save. Managed automatically.

triggers.description: Events that start this workflow automatically.

inputs.description: Named input parameters for the workflow. Access in nodes via {{ input.param_name }}.

input_schema.description: Full JSON Schema for validating workflow input. Use instead of (or alongside) 'inputs' for complex validation.
input_schema.$comment: Validates the input object passed when running the workflow.

variables.description: Workflow-level constants. Access in nodes via {{ variables.name }}.

depends_on_workflows.description: Other workflows that must succeed before this one can run.

nodes.description: Ordered list of steps (nodes) in the workflow.

settings.description: Global execution settings for this workflow.

required.description: Whether this input must be provided.

default.description: Default value used when not provided.

WorkflowDependency.description: Declares that another workflow must complete before this one starts.

workflow.description: Name of the workflow this one depends on.

require_success.description: If true, this workflow only runs if the dependency succeeded.

Trigger.description: An event source that starts the workflow.

schedule.description: Cron expression (UTC). Example: '*/5 * * * *' runs every 5 minutes.

response_mode.description: 'full' returns execution metadata (default). 'output'/'wait_for_result' returns the workflow output synchronously.

header_filter.description: Only trigger if incoming headers match these rules.

event.description: Event name to subscribe to (Redis pub/sub channel or internal event).

filter.description: Rhai expression to filter event data. Only trigger if expression evaluates to true.

json_path.description: JSONPath filter expression applied to the event payload.

delay.description: Seconds to wait before processing the event.

routing.description: Conditional routing rules — trigger different workflows based on event content.

key.description: Template expression for the dedup key. Example: '{{ input.repository.id }}'.

wait_seconds.description: Seconds to wait after the last event before triggering. Default: 5.

max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum total wait time before forcing a trigger. Default: 60.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match against header value.

required.description: Reject the request if this header is missing.

condition.description: Rhai expression. If true, target_workflow is triggered.

Node.description: A single step in the workflow.

id.description: Unique node identifier within this workflow. Referenced in depends_on.

type.description: Node type — determines what this step does.

depends_on.description: Node IDs that must complete before this node runs.

for_each.description: Run this node once per item in the input array.

condition.description: Rhai expression. Node is skipped if this evaluates to false.

pinned_data.description: Testing: when set, this value is used as node output instead of executing the node.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts (not counting the initial attempt).

delay_seconds.description: Base delay between retries in seconds.

backoff.description: Delay growth strategy. 'fixed' = same delay each time, 'linear' = delay * attempt, 'exponential' = delay^attempt.

max_delay_seconds.description: Cap on retry delay to prevent unbounded waits.

jitter.description: Add ±25% random jitter to delay to prevent thundering herd.

continue.description: Continue workflow even if this node fails. Equivalent to action: continue.

action.description: 'fail' = abort workflow. 'continue' = proceed with null output. 'skip' = same as continue. 'fallback' = use fallback_value or fallback_node.

fallback_value.description: Static value to use as this node's output when action is 'fallback'.

fallback_node.description: Node ID to execute as a fallback when this node fails (requires action: fallback).

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum total execution time in seconds. Default: 300 (5 minutes).

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of nodes running in parallel. Default: 10.

store_traces.description: Persist per-node execution records. Disable for high-throughput workflows to save I/O.

chunk_size.description: Batch size for for_each processing. 0 = process all items at once.

max_for_each_items.description: Max items in a for_each loop to prevent memory exhaustion. Default: 10000.

error_workflow.description: Name of workflow to run when this workflow fails. Receives error context as input.

debug.description: Capture full input/output for every node. Useful during development.

enable_checkpoints.description: Persist state after each node for crash recovery. Disable for short-lived latency-sensitive workflows.
